paper_title: RNA Sequencing Analysis of SlMPK4 Downstream Genes in Tomato Pollen

methods.description: This method involves analyzing RNA sequencing data to identify differentially expressed genes (DEGs) in tomato pollen, particularly in the context of SlMPK4 silencing. The analysis helps in understanding the impact of SlMPK4 on gene expression during different floral developmental stages.

steps.description: First, the Illumina raw RNA sequencing reads were analyzed to eliminate low-quality and adaptor contaminant sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: filter out low-quality and adaptor sequences from RNA sequencing reads

steps.description: Then, the reads were aligned to ribosomal RNA (rRNA) and transfer RNA (tRNA) sequences using Bowtie to remove potential ribosomal and tRNA contaminating reads, allowing up to three mismatches.
steps.searchable_summary: align reads to rRNA and tRNA sequences using Bowtie to remove contaminants
outputs: reads without rRNA and tRNA contamination

steps.description: The filtered reads were then aligned to the tomato genome with TopHat, allowing one segment mismatch.
steps.searchable_summary: align filtered reads to tomato genome using TopHat
inputs: reads without rRNA and tRNA contamination

steps.description: Raw counts of mapped reads for each gene model of tomato were derived after alignments and then normalized to FPKM.
steps.searchable_summary: derive raw counts and normalize to FPKM

steps.description: For the expression analyses of selected genes from transgenic and control flowers, the raw counts of RNA sequencing expression data were used to find genes that were differentially expressed with the DESeq package.
steps.searchable_summary: identify differentially expressed genes using DESeq

steps.description: The variable and stable transformed expression data were then supplied to the LIMMA package.
F-tests were then executed and raw P-values were adjusted using the Benjamini-Hochberg procedure for multiple testing.
steps.searchable_summary: perform F-tests and adjust P-values with Benjamini-Hochberg

steps.description: Differentially expressed genes were fed to the Plant MetGenMAP system database to identify enriched GO terms.
steps.searchable_summary: identify enriched GO terms using Plant MetGenMAP

steps.description: Metabolic pathway analysis was conducted using Blastx/Blastp 2.2.24+ in KEGG.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct metabolic pathway analysis using KEGG
